gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 (radeonsi, navi21, LLVM 20.1.2, DRM 3.61, 6.14.0-36-generic)
AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT (radeonsi, gfx1201, LLVM 20.1.8, DRM 3.64, 6.17.1-2-cachyos)
AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (radeonsi, navi21, LLVM 20.1.6, DRM 3.63, 6.15.4-3-cachyos)
notes:
This is based on the demo of the game (since I wanted to try before I buy). I cannot get any further than the first menu. It doesn't matter what I do in the menu, it always crashes, including doing absolutely nothing (load game, games gets to menu, wait, crash). The amount of time it takes to crash varies a little but always within seconds of the main menu having loaded.

 Tried multiple different versions of Proton - my system default (CachyOS flavour of of Steam Runtime Proton 10), Proton 10, Proton Experimental, Proton Hotfix, and finally Proton 9. They all result in the exact same behaviour with only slight differences in frame rate observed.

Also tried a system update (already had the latest AMD drivers anyway) with no difference at all.
